author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/tools/bash/mod.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Split execute_bash (src/tools/bash/mod.rs:319-401) into: (1) parse_bash_args(args) -> Result<BashArgs, String> handling command/run_in_background/timeout extraction and validate_command; (2) platform::spawn_sync(cmd) -> std::process::Output and platform::spawn_async(cmd) -> BackgroundHandle in a platform submodule that hides #[cfg(windows)] / #[cfg(unix)] selection; (3) render_output(output, max_bytes) -> (String, bool) for truncation + is_error assembly. execute_bash then becomes ~15 lines: parse → spawn → render. Cyclomatic complexity drops from ~12 to ~3.

**Blocking:** src/tools/bash/* is reserved scope.
